tools.name: mail_compose
tools.description: Compose an email draft in Mail. The message opens for review before sending.

to.description: Recipient email address or comma-separated addresses

invoke.script:
tell application "Mail"
  set newMessage to make new outgoing message with properties {subject:"{{subject}}", content:"{{body}}", visible:true}
  tell newMessage
    make new to recipient at end of to recipients with properties {address:"{{to}}"}
  end tell
end tell
return "Email drafted to {{to}}"

tools.name: mail_unread_count
tools.description: Get the count of unread emails in the Inbox.

invoke.script:
tell application "Mail"
  set inbox to mailbox "INBOX" of account 1
  set unreadCount to (count of (messages of inbox whose read status is false))
  return unreadCount as string
end tell
